x_snc_airop_check_definition.ai_justification: DEX and Now Assist must both be active for AI-powered device diagnosis and agentic endpoint workflows. Without both plugins, DEX AI capabilities including conversational diagnosis and automated remediation are completely unavailable.
x_snc_airop_check_definition.remediation_guidance: Informational check — no remediation required. Monitor retirement rate as a governance health signal. High retirement rates indicate active KB hygiene which is positive for Now Assist AI Search quality.

sys_update_version.name: x_snc_airop_check_definition_4e03a33acfd903108935fb251d851c03
sys_update_version.payload:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?><record_update><x_snc_airop_check_definition action="INSERT_OR_UPDATE">
<ai_justification><![CDATA[DEX and Now Assist must both be active for AI-powered device diagnosis and agentic endpoint workflows. Without both plugins, DEX AI capabilities including conversational diagnosis and automated remediation are completely unavailable.]]></ai_justification>
<check_name>KB Article Retirement Rate</check_name>
<check_script><![CDATA[(function(checkDef, dateFilter) {
    var gaRetired = new GlideAggregate('kb_knowledge');
    gaRetired.addQuery('workflow_state', 'retired');
    gaRetired.addAggregate('COUNT');
    gaRetired.query();
    var retired = gaRetired.next() ? parseInt(gaRetired.getAggregate('COUNT')) : 0;

    var gaTotal = new GlideAggregate('kb_knowledge');
    gaTotal.addAggregate('COUNT');
    gaTotal.query();
    var total = gaTotal.next() ? parseInt(gaTotal.getAggregate('COUNT')) : 0;

    var pct = total > 0 ? Math.round((retired / total) * 100) : 0;
    var actualValue = pct + '% retired (' + retired + ' of ' + total + ' articles)';

    // Informational check — active retirement indicates good KB hygiene
    return {
        status: 'ready',
        actualValue: actualValue,
        finding: 'KB retirement rate: ' + pct + '% (' + retired + ' retired of ' + total + ' total). Active article retirement is a positive signal — it indicates KB governance is in place to keep Now Assist AI Search content current and accurate.'
    };
})]]></check_script>
<is_active>true</is_active>
<is_clone_sensitive>false</is_clone_sensitive>
<is_manual>false</is_manual>
<module>ITSM</module>
<number>CHK0005942</number>
<order>30</order>
<remediation_guidance>Informational check — no remediation required. Monitor retirement rate as a governance health signal. High retirement rates indicate active KB hygiene which is positive for Now Assist AI Search quality.</remediation_guidance>
<sys_created_by>admin</sys_created_by>
<sys_created_on>2026-06-09 22:05:59</sys_created_on>
<sys_id>4e03a33acfd903108935fb251d851c03</sys_id>
<sys_mod_count>0</sys_mod_count>
<sys_updated_by>admin</sys_updated_by>
<sys_updated_on>2026-06-09 22:05:59</sys_updated_on>
</x_snc_airop_check_definition></record_update>
